name: about_page_9_pages_learn-about-us

observed_strengths.observation: 'Take a Quiz' H2 appears twice — quiz-based product recommendation tool featured prominently on about page, reduces decision paralysis for new visitors
'Keep on Growing' brand philosophy section — strong values-driven brand story that builds emotional connection
Strong meta description: 'Founded in 2012...Beardbrand was founded to help you be the person that you want to be' — brand purpose clearly articulated for SEO and social
'What Type of Beardsman are You?' and 'What's the Best Beard Style for You?' quizzes — personalization tools that drive qualified purchase intent

missing_or_weak.observation: Quizzes are on the about page but not surfaced in the main nav or on collection pages — high-value discovery tool is buried for first-time shoppers browsing the catalog

purchase_path_notes: About page has strong brand story + quiz tools that would help first-time buyers find their product match. The URL at /pages/learn-about-us is non-standard (standard is /pages/about which returns 404 on other stores sharing the same pattern).
